header_findings.recommendation: Add 'Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload' to enforce HTTPS.
Implement a Content-Security-Policy header to mitigate XSS and data injection attacks.
Add 'X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block' (legacy browsers) or rely on CSP.
Add 'Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin' to limit referrer leakage.
Add a Permissions-Policy header to restrict browser feature access (camera, mic, geolocation).
Add 'Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy: same-origin' to isolate browsing context.
Add 'Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy: same-origin' to prevent cross-origin resource loading.
Reveals web server software and version. Remove or genericize this header.

ssl_findings.detail:
Subject: CN=*.herokuapp.com
Issuer: CN=Amazon RSA 2048 M01,O=Amazon,C=US

findings.title: Verbose error or internal path disclosure [CONFIRMED]
findings.evidence: Response (500) matched internal/stack/path pattern. Snippet (sanitized): <html>   <head>     <meta charset='utf-8'>      <title>Error: Unexpected path: /api/%7Bbad%7D</title>     <style>* {   margin: 0;   padding: 0;   outline: 0; }  body {   padding: 80px 100px;   font: 1...
findings.impact: Small disclosure that can become a big leak: attackers learn stack, paths, or internal IPs and chain into further exploitation.
findings.remediation: Return generic error pages in production; disable stack traces and path disclosure; avoid leaking framework or DB names.

findings_summary.title: Strict-Transport-Security
findings_summary.remediation: Add 'Strict-Transport-Security: max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains; preload' to enforce HTTPS.

findings_summary.title: Content-Security-Policy
findings_summary.remediation: Implement a Content-Security-Policy header to mitigate XSS and data injection attacks.

findings_summary.title: X-XSS-Protection
findings_summary.remediation: Add 'X-XSS-Protection: 1; mode=block' (legacy browsers) or rely on CSP.

findings_summary.title: Referrer-Policy
findings_summary.remediation: Add 'Referrer-Policy: strict-origin-when-cross-origin' to limit referrer leakage.

findings_summary.title: Permissions-Policy
findings_summary.remediation: Add a Permissions-Policy header to restrict browser feature access (camera, mic, geolocation).

findings_summary.title: Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy
findings_summary.remediation: Add 'Cross-Origin-Opener-Policy: same-origin' to isolate browsing context.

findings_summary.title: Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy
findings_summary.remediation: Add 'Cross-Origin-Resource-Policy: same-origin' to prevent cross-origin resource loading.

findings_summary.title: Server
findings_summary.remediation: Reveals web server software and version. Remove or genericize this header.
